nodes.label: AI for first drafts and data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to create first drafts of action plans, to create questions for surveys, to take data from surveys and create drafts of executive level summaries and PowerPoint presentations

nodes.label: AI for problem solving with store data
nodes.grounding_span: I will load data from our survey company and ask the program to determine if there are any overarching themes

nodes.label: AI for quick turnaround tasks
nodes.label_negative: Personal handling of quick turnaround tasks
nodes.grounding_span: when she asks for a quick turnaround (less than six hours), I will personally handle the project from start to finish without AI assistance

nodes.label: AI requiring data correction
nodes.grounding_span: there are usually corrections that need to be made with the data which has to do with the how the data was formatted to begin with

nodes.label: Collaborative refinement with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate with AI than completely delegate

nodes.label: AI for high-leverage activities
nodes.grounding_span: excited to see everything it can do to automate tasks and allow me focus on higher leverage activities

nodes.label: AI for culture survey analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I used Microsoft Forms to collect the data and then was able to use AI to collect the data, create an executive level summary of the findings

nodes.label: AI as enhancer of personal service
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to personal service
nodes.grounding_span: AI has and will continue to help better serve our customers

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to do this in a short period of time with a high quality output thanks to AI

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I had to go back and manually correct those

nodes.label: Personal touch and quality
nodes.grounding_span: The last manual touch ups are more of a personal choice and usually limited to a couple of sentences that I feel could flow better

nodes.label: Team morale and customer satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: it improved the morale of the Team and significantly improve our sales results and KPIs

nodes.label: Positive about AI for first drafts and analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to create first drafts of action plans, to create questions for surveys

nodes.label: Negative about AI for quick turnaround tasks
nodes.grounding_span: when she asks for a quick turnaround (less than six hours), I will personally handle the project from start to finish without AI assistance

nodes.label: Frustration with AI data errors
nodes.grounding_span: The AI model I was using scored those as 0s when averaging the data. I had to go back and manually correct those

nodes.label: Positive about collaborative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate with AI than completely delegate

nodes.label: Positive about AI for high-leverage activities
nodes.grounding_span: excited to see everything it can do to automate tasks and allow me focus on higher leverage activities

nodes.label: Positive about AI for culture survey
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to do this in a short period of time with a high quality output thanks to AI

nodes.label: Positive about AI enhancing personal service
nodes.grounding_span: AI has and will continue to help better serve our customers

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through multiple prompts
nodes.grounding_span: I will give it multiple prompts as I work on a project to continually refine the output

nodes.label: Strategic delegation based on time and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI on projects where I have more time to double and triple check all the numbers
